<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:三輪神社 (津幡町)]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|三輪神社 (津幡町)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)
| native_name = 三輪神社
| image = MIwajinja-tubata.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)
| coordinates = {{coord|36.659055555555554|136.7337222222222}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi|en|Ōmononushi|fr|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主|mni|ꯑꯣꯃꯣꯅꯣꯅꯨꯁꯤ|ru|Омононуси|simple|Ōmononushi|zh|大物主|qid=Q10936701}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Miwa Shrine'''|三輪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Miwa shrines|lt=Miwa shrines|qid=Q134986940}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182333</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182333</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1792


== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|ja|加賀国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11399659}}
** Series ordinal: 32
** P155: {{ill|Nomano Shrine|lt=Nomano Shrine|qid=Q135040289}}
** P156: {{ill|Kamo Shrine|lt=Kamo Shrine|qid=Q135040291}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|lt=Tsubata|arz|تسوباتا|ceb|Tsubata Machi|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|es|Tsubata (Ishikawa)|fa|تسوباتا|fr|Tsubata|frvoyage|Tsubata|it|Tsubata|ja|津幡町|ko|쓰바타정|mg|Tsubata|ms|Tsubata, Ishikawa|my|ဆွတ်ဘတမြို့၊ အိရှိခါဝါ|nl|Tsubata|pl|Tsubata|ru|Цубата|sv|Tsubata|tl|Tsubata, Ishikawa|tr|Tsubata|uk|Цубата|vi|Tsubata, Ishikawa|zh|津幡町|qid=Q432014}}
* {{ill|Kaga Province|lt=Kaga Province|cs|Provincie Kaga|de|Provinz Kaga|en|Kaga Province|eo|Provinco Kaga|es|Provincia de Kaga|fa|ولایت کاگا|fi|Kagan provinssi|fr|Province de Kaga|gl|Provincia de Kaga|id|Provinsi Kaga|it|Kaga (provincia)|ja|加賀国|ko|가가국|lt|Kagos provincija|nl|Kaga (provincie)|pt|Província de Kaga|ru|Кага (провинция)|simple|Kaga Province|sk|Kaga (provincia)|sr|Провинција Кага|tr|Kaga (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Каґа|zh_min_nan|Kaga-kok|zh_yue|加賀國|zh|加賀國|qid=Q907469}}
* {{ill|Kahoku District, Ishikawa|lt=Kahoku district|ceb|Kahoku Gun|en|Kahoku District, Ishikawa|es|Distrito de Kahoku (Ishikawa)|fr|District de Kahoku|id|Distrik Kahoku, Ishikawa|it|Distretto di Kahoku|ja|河北郡|ko|가호쿠군|pl|Powiat Kahoku|uk|Повіт Кахоку|zh|河北郡|qid=Q1130942}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|36.659055555555554|136.7337222222222}}
* {{coord|36.659166|136.733633}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182333</ref>

== image (P18) ==

* MIwajinja-tubata.jpg

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182333
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 8220005006995

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Miwa Shrine|lt=Miwa Shrine|qid=Q135040290}}
* {{ill|Miwa Shrine|lt=Miwa Shrine|qid=Q135040290}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182333</ref>
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}}

==References==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Miwa shrines]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]]
[[JA:三輪神社 (津幡町)]]

{{wikidata link|Q11357406}}
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|三輪神社 (津幡町)|version=107493986|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}}
{{神社
|名称   = 三輪神社
|画像   = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]<br />鳥居
|所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2
|位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱
|社格   = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社}}
|創建   = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）
|本殿   = 
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}}
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社}}。

== 祭神 ==
{{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。

== 由緒 ==
創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる<ref>{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。</ref>。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。

==交通==
* {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分

== 脚注 ==
{{reflist}}

==参考文献==
* 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日

== 外部リンク ==
*[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁）

{{shinto-stub}}

==End Japanese==
[[Category:石川県の神社]]
[[Category:加賀国の式内社]]
[[Category:石川県の旧村社]]
[[Category:津幡町の建築物]]
[[Category:津幡町の歴史]]
[[Category:三輪神社]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
